name: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 5
dimensions: Unfolded: 154.9 x 129.9 x 6.1 mm, Folded: 154.9 x 67.1 x 13.4 mm
build_material: Glass front (Gorilla Glass Victus 2) (folded), plastic front (unfolded), glass back (Gorilla Glass Victus 2), aluminum frame
water_resistance: IPX8 water resistant (up to 1.5m for 30 min)
sim_type: Nano-SIM and eSIM or Dual SIM (2 Nano-SIMs and eSIM, dual stand-by)
colors: Icy Blue, Phantom Black, Cream, Gray, Blue
processor: Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 for Galaxy (4 nm)
cpu: Octa-core (1x3.36 GHz Cortex-X3 & 2x2.8 GHz Cortex-A715 & 2x2.8 GHz Cortex-A710 & 3x2.0 GHz Cortex-A510)
cam_main_sensor: 50 MP, f/1.8, 23mm (wide), 1.0µm, Dual Pixel PDAF, OIS
cam_telephoto: 10 MP, f/2.4, (telephoto), PDAF, OIS, 3x optical zoom
cam_front_resolution: Under display: 4 MP, f/1.8 | Cover camera: 10 MP, f/2.2
seo_overview: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 5 is a premium foldable device featuring the powerful Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 processor, a massive 7.6-inch Dynamic AMOLED main display, and a refined gapless hinge design. Packed with Galaxy AI features and a versatile camera setup, it stands as one of the best foldables on the market.
verdict: If you are looking for the ultimate productivity machine that fits in your pocket, the Galaxy Z Fold 5 remains a highly capable choice with strong software support and exceptional multitasking features.
